ShortDescription.Value: Moves CS2 traffic light visuals to more realistic far-side placement.

Publish.LongDescription:
# Real World Traffic Lights
Real World Traffic Lights mirrors Cities: Skylines II traffic light placement data so generated signal heads sit across the intersection and face the through road, closer to real-world mast-arm traffic light layouts.
Inspired by [Dava787](https://www.twitch.tv/dava787).
## Features
- More realistic far-side traffic light visual placement - Mirrors generated signal position, curve range, and rotation data - Refreshes existing road nodes and edges when a city loads - Works as a visual-only code mod
## Notes
This mod changes traffic light visuals only. It does not change traffic simulation, lane routing, signal timing, pathfinding, road data, or save data.
Source files are included in the package under `Source/` and released under the MIT License.
GitHub source: https://github.com/northernst11-bot/RealWorldTrafficLights
Publish.ChangeLog: Version 0.1.0: - Initial public release. - Mirrors generated traffic light visual placement to face the through road from the far side of the intersection. - Refreshes existing road node and edge secondary objects when a city loads. - Includes source code in the published package.
